positive: A majestic, symmetrical celestial forest silhouette. Highly detailed composition featuring bioluminescent flora, stylized crescent moons, and geometric crystal structures intertwined with ancient, stylized tree roots. The overall aesthetic should be inspired by Art Nouveau and Nordic mythology, executed with deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and glowing gold accents. Strong, clean silhouettes against a slightly gradient smoky background. Central, circular composition suitable for apparel printing. Fantasy concept art, vector illustration style, high contrast, intricate details, magical realism, print-friendly.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, brand, excessive detail, noise, poor composition, extra limbs, bad anatomy, writing, amateur, messy, sketch, grainy, low resolution
